title: watcher: EventSource trait + poll impl (500ms) with cursor de-dup
action: EventSource: poll snapshot every interval, diff agent statuses, emit StatusChanged events. Cursor de-dup: never emit the same (pane,status) transition twice (handles agent_status_changed 2x/1ms + subscribe replay). Poll is the M1 default per Telegram-B; subscribe upgrade is later. Drivable with FakeHerdr.

truths: emits on real status change only

verify: cargo test --quiet watcher && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: PollWatcher + StatusCursor: 500ms poll, emits de-duplicated status changes only (handles agent_status_changed 2x/1ms + subscribe replay), drivable with Fake. Committed a7e4a87.
trace.verification_evidence: 2 watcher tests pass: cursor_emits_only_real_changes_and_dedups, poll_once_reports_driven_transition_once. clippy clean.
trace.verify_output: 2 watcher tests: cursor emits real changes only + dedups duplicates/replay, poll_once reports driven transition once; clippy clean
trace.verify_command: cargo test watcher && cargo clippy -- -D warnings
